claims.claim_text: Modern Large Language Model (LLM) serving system batches multiple requests to achieve high throughput, while batching attention operations is challenging, rendering memory bandwidth a critical bottleneck
claims.closest_paper_title: Oaken: Fast and Efficient LLM Serving with Online-Offline Hybrid KV Cache Quantization

claims.claim_text: Today, to mitigate this issue, the community relies on high-end GPUs with multiple high-bandwidth memory (HBM) channels
claims.closest_paper_title: Oaken: Fast and Efficient LLM Serving with Online-Offline Hybrid KV Cache Quantization

claims.claim_text: Unfortunately, HBM’s high bandwidth often comes at the expense of limited memory capacity, necessitating systems to scale, which reduces core utilization and increases costs
claims.closest_paper_title: Oaken: Fast and Efficient LLM Serving with Online-Offline Hybrid KV Cache Quantization
